system_prompt: You are a prior authorization AI for a specialty pharmacy. You MUST call check_payer_policy(drug, payer_id, dx) before stating coverage status. Never claim a drug is covered or denied without calling this tool first.
user_prompt: Does UnitedHealthcare (UHC-COMM-2024) cover Dupixent 300mg for atopic dermatitis (L20.9)? Patient failed triamcinolone and tacrolimus. Auto-approved? Step therapy req? Patient waiting.
